title: The 3 Most Promising Healthcare Tech Stocks for April 2023
text: In discussing healthcare tech stocks, it pays to understand what healthcare technology is broadly. Healthcare technology, also known as HealthTech, refers to any technology developed to improve the healthcare system.

title: Life Sciences Brands Reach Clinically Relevant Audiences with New Veeva Crossix Prime Segments
text: Suite of privacy-safe health segments drive targeted advertising to efficiently reach patients  PLEASANTON, Calif. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced Veeva Crossix Prime Segments, a new solution helping life sciences brands improve media efficiency and better target patients by reaching more highly-qualified health audiences.

title: Veeva MedTech Clinical Trials Report Signals Significant Opportunity to Improve Data Delivery and Quality
text: 83% use email, portals, and paper to exchange information with study partners, slowing study execution and increasing risk of non-compliance PLEASANTON, Calif. , April 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today released its first-ever report examining global trends in medtech clinical trials.

title: Veeva Commercial Summit Connects Nearly 1,500 Life Sciences Leaders Across Sales, Medical, and Marketing
text: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced that leaders from Bristol Myers Squibb, Eli Lilly and Company, Genentech, Janssen, and Merck will be keynote speakers at the 2023 Veeva Commercial Summit on May 2-3 in Boston. Speakers from leading and emerging biopharmas will share how advancements in digital engagement, content, data, and analytics elevate commercial strategy and execution.

title: Here's Why Veeva Systems Stock Climbed 11% in March
text: Veeva stock surged after it beat earnings estimates and provided suitable forecasts for next year. The stock was heavily influenced by macroeconomic news, including banking sector turmoil and Federal Reserve policy updates.

title: Does Veeva Systems Deserve Its Rich Premium?
text: Premium-laden stocks haven't performed particularly well in the current bear market. Veeva Systems, a top performer in the last bull market, has seen a nearly 30% drop in its share price since the start of 2022.

title: Veeva Pulse Reveals Digital Content More Than Twice as Effective in Driving Promotional Response
text: Significant opportunity for biopharmas as only 39% of HCP meetings today present digital content PLEASANTON, Calif. , April 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today released the latest findings from its Veeva Pulse Field Trends Report, the largest analysis of global healthcare professional (HCP) engagement across the biopharma industry.
